title: Requesting a New Laptop or Peripheral Hardware
text:
Q: How do I request a new laptop or peripheral hardware?
A: To request a new laptop or peripheral hardware, please follow these steps: Windows: Step 1: Log in to the company intranet using your employee credentials. Step 2: Navigate to the 'IT Support' section. Step 3: Click on 'Hardware Requests'. Step 4: Fill out the request form, specifying the type of laptop or peripheral you need, along with a justification for your request. Step 5: Submit the form. macOS: Step 1: Access the company intranet using your employee credentials. Step 2: Go to the 'IT Support' section. Step 3: Select 'Hardware Requests'. Step 4: Complete the request form, detailing the laptop or peripheral you are requesting and the reason for your need. Step 5: Submit the form. After submission, you will receive a confirmation email, and our IT team will review your request. Please allow up to five business days for processing. If you have any urgent needs, contact the IT helpdesk directly via the chat feature on the intranet.
